summary: Recorded the strategy abstraction decision in `Fibo_Codex/strategy_abstraction_decision.md`. The note chooses plain module-level functions for the initial recursive and iterative Fibonacci strategies, explains why classes would be premature, and documents lightweight responsibility boundaries and an extension rule for future strategies. The dependency summary referenced a `fibonacci_exploration/src/` layout, but that directory is not present in this worktree, so the decision was recorded in the existing planning area instead of alongside source modules.
